validation.redactionBoundary: synthetic response review-preflight validator fixtures only; no real validation receipt, response envelope path, raw account, credential, provider payload, response payload, order payload, token, app key, app secret, execution, fill, or order confirmation content

promotionRules: future review requires an explicit owner-supplied response validation result receipt path
future review must validate the receipt with the local receipt validator before provider authorization review
future review cannot record the local envelope path, raw response payload, or provider payload
future review success still does not authorize provider calls, runtime routes, UI, DB writes, orders, or live trading
